label: Root Cockpit Mac mini tunnel
updateRequiredMessage: Root Cockpit 0.1.32 is required. This release replaces the startup sequence with one full-screen space-flight boot into the globe, removes duplicate loading/login/update flicker, limits text selection to search, adds 12H/24H clock format, fixes Mission Brief toggle behavior, and corrects save-password switch visuals.
message: Root Cockpit 0.1.32 is required. This release replaces the startup sequence with one full-screen space-flight boot into the globe, removes duplicate loading/login/update flicker, limits text selection to search, adds 12H/24H clock format, fixes Mission Brief toggle behavior, and corrects save-password switch visuals.
